name: Cobb Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole chicken breast (cooked, boned, and skinned)
recipeInstructions:
Chop the lettuce, watercress, endive, and romaine into very fine pieces. In a large bowl or six individual wide shallow bowls, mix the chopped greens with chives. Arrange the diced tomatoes, cooked chicken, bacon, avocado, and eggs in narrow strips or wedges across the top of the salad greens. Sprinkle with cheese.
Meanwhile, to make the dressing, combine water, red wine vinegar, sugar, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, minced garlic, olive oil, and vegetable oil in a separate bowl. Chill until ready to serve. At the table, pour about 1/2 cup of dressing over the salad and toss gently. Pass the remaining dressing at the table for individual serving.
